caption: A man with a tall, spiked gray wig, glasses, and headphones is seated in a studio setting. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt and a red bow tie. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, and his gaze is directed toward something off-camera to the left. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and a yellow "LEE" sign. A white box and other studio equipment are visible in the background. The on-screen graphics include a logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains mostly stationary, with slight shifts in his head position and facial expression as he speaks, while the camera angle and studio lighting remain constant.
